info.title: RetailOps API
info.description: Backend API for the RetailOps cloud-native AI platform.

get.description: Returns basic service health information for local checks, Docker health checks, CI validation and future Kubernetes probes.
Returns service readiness information, including database connectivity.

Returns application metrics in Prometheus text exposition format. Sprint 11 exposes API service metadata and Sprint 9 real-time stream processing metrics derived from the persisted event log and consumer state tables.
Returns compact operational counters for the RetailOps dashboard, including product, sales, inventory, forecast, anomaly and recommendation counts.
Returns a compact dashboard-ready payload with summary counters, stock-risk counters, sales trend and open work items. This endpoint is intentionally read-only and presentation-oriented.

parameters.name: sales_trend_days

schema.description: Number of days included in the sales trend.
schema.title: Sales Trend Days

parameters.description: Number of days included in the sales trend.

parameters.name: work_items_limit

schema.description: Maximum number of work items to return.
schema.title: Work Items Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of work items to return.

get.description: Returns real-time dashboard data derived from persisted event stream metrics: live sales counters, event freshness, processing status, recent stream events, alert-like events and consumer state.

parameters.name: window_minutes

schema.description: Trailing live window used to aggregate metric observations.
schema.title: Window Minutes

parameters.description: Trailing live window used to aggregate metric observations.

parameters.name: recent_events_limit

schema.description: Maximum number of recent stream events to return.
schema.title: Recent Events Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of recent stream events to return.

parameters.name: alerts_limit

schema.description: Maximum number of recent alert-like events to return.
schema.title: Alerts Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of recent alert-like events to return.

get.description: Returns daily sales units and revenue for dashboard charting.

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of trailing days to aggregate.
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Number of trailing days to aggregate.

get.description: Returns open anomaly-like items for dashboard visibility. The endpoint keeps the historical /dashboard/alerts contract used after Sprint 3.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of alerts to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return.

get.description: Returns recent recommendation-like items for dashboard decision support.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return.

get.description: Returns a combined operational backlog from anomalies and recommendations. This is useful for a single dashboard widget.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of work items to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of work items to return.

get.description: Returns stock-risk counters for operational dashboard cards.

post.description: Moves an open alert to acknowledged and records a workflow action.
Assigns an alert, moves it to in_progress and records a workflow action.
Moves an acknowledged or in-progress alert to resolved.
Dismisses an alert. A decision comment is required.
Records a comment without changing the current alert status.
Moves a proposed recommendation to accepted and records a workflow action.
Rejects a proposed recommendation. A decision comment is required.
Assigns a recommendation owner without changing its status.
Moves an accepted recommendation to implemented.
Dismisses a proposed recommendation. A decision comment is required.

schema.title: Response Get Product Performance Analytics Products Get
Response Get Inventory Risk Analytics Inventory Risk Get

get.description: Returns products using a stable list response contract with items and pagination metadata. Supports MVP filters and sorting.

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search in SKU, name or category.
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search in SKU, name or category.

get.description: Returns a read-only product drill-down composed from product, sales, inventory, forecast, anomaly, alert, recommendation and workflow tables.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of related rows returned per section.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of related rows returned per section.

get.description: Returns forecasts using a stable list response contract with items and pagination metadata. Supports MVP product/status/method/date filters.

parameters.name: date_from

schema.description: Filter periods starting on or after this date.
schema.title: Date From

parameters.description: Filter periods starting on or after this date.

parameters.name: date_to

schema.description: Filter periods ending on or before this date.
schema.title: Date To

parameters.description: Filter periods ending on or before this date.

get.description: Returns inventory snapshots using the stable list response contract with items and pagination metadata.

parameters.name: product_id

schema.description: Filter inventory snapshots for one product.
schema.title: Product Id

parameters.description: Filter inventory snapshots for one product.

parameters.name: unit_of_measure

schema.description: Filter by inventory unit of measure.
schema.title: Unit Of Measure

parameters.description: Filter by inventory unit of measure.

parameters.name: recorded_from

schema.description: Filter snapshots recorded at or after this timestamp.
schema.title: Recorded From

parameters.description: Filter snapshots recorded at or after this timestamp.

parameters.name: recorded_to

schema.description: Filter snapshots recorded at or before this timestamp.
schema.title: Recorded To

parameters.description: Filter snapshots recorded at or before this timestamp.

get.description: Returns product-level sales records using the stable list response contract with items and pagination metadata.

parameters.name: sold_from

schema.description: Filter sales sold at or after this timestamp.
schema.title: Sold From

parameters.description: Filter sales sold at or after this timestamp.

parameters.name: sold_to

schema.description: Filter sales sold at or before this timestamp.
schema.title: Sold To

parameters.description: Filter sales sold at or before this timestamp.

get.description: Returns product-level stock risk classification based on latest inventory and forecast signals.
List selectable local demo users for the frontend switcher.
Return the currently selected local demo user.
Return permissions assigned to the current local demo user.
Return mock notifications visible to the selected demo user.

post.description: Mark a visible mock notification as read for the selected demo user.

DashboardLiveAlert.title: DashboardLiveAlert
DashboardLiveAlert.description: Recent alert-like event from the real-time stream.

DashboardLiveConsumerState.title: DashboardLiveConsumerState
DashboardLiveConsumerState.description: Persisted consumer state for live operations monitoring.

DashboardLiveEvent.title: DashboardLiveEvent
DashboardLiveEvent.description: Recent processed event shown in live operations views.

DashboardLiveEventStatusCounts.title: DashboardLiveEventStatusCounts
DashboardLiveEventStatusCounts.description: Event processing counters for the selected live window.

DashboardLiveFreshness.title: DashboardLiveFreshness
DashboardLiveFreshness.description: Freshness metadata for the real-time event stream.

DashboardLiveMetricValue.title: DashboardLiveMetricValue
DashboardLiveMetricValue.description: Raw live metric value with observation metadata.

DashboardLiveMetrics.title: DashboardLiveMetrics
DashboardLiveMetrics.description: Normalized live operational counters for the selected window.

DashboardLiveOperationsResponse.title: DashboardLiveOperationsResponse
DashboardLiveOperationsResponse.description: Composite live operations response backed by real-time metrics tables.

DashboardOperationalVisibilityResponse.title: DashboardOperationalVisibilityResponse
DashboardOperationalVisibilityResponse.description: Composite dashboard response for operations-oriented overview screens.

DashboardSalesTrendItem.title: DashboardSalesTrendItem
DashboardSalesTrendItem.description: One point in the dashboard sales trend chart.

DashboardStockRiskSummary.title: DashboardStockRiskSummary
DashboardStockRiskSummary.description: Aggregated stock-risk counters for operational visibility.

DashboardSummary.title: DashboardSummary
DashboardSummary.description: Top-level operational counters used by the RetailOps dashboard.

DashboardWorkItem.title: DashboardWorkItem
DashboardWorkItem.description: Small operational work item for dashboard widgets.

DashboardWorkItemsResponse.title: DashboardWorkItemsResponse
DashboardWorkItemsResponse.description: Response for open dashboard work item widgets.

DemoUserListResponse.title: DemoUserListResponse
DemoUserListResponse.description: Selectable local users used by the frontend demo switcher.

DemoUserResponse.title: DemoUserResponse
DemoUserResponse.description: Public mock identity used by Sprint 7 role-aware UI.

ForecastListResponse.title: ForecastListResponse
ForecastListResponse.description: Stable list response for Forecast endpoints.

ForecastResponse.title: ForecastResponse
ForecastResponse.description: Stable public representation of a Forecast.

InventorySnapshotListResponse.title: InventorySnapshotListResponse
InventorySnapshotListResponse.description: Stable list response for inventory snapshot endpoints.

InventorySnapshotResponse.title: InventorySnapshotResponse
InventorySnapshotResponse.description: Stable public representation of an inventory snapshot.

NotificationResponse.title: NotificationResponse
NotificationResponse.description: Local mock notification visible to a demo user.

PaginationMetadata.title: PaginationMetadata
PaginationMetadata.description: Pagination metadata returned with every list response.

Product360Alert.title: Product360Alert
Product360Alert.description: Operational alert linked to a product.

Product360Anomaly.title: Product360Anomaly
Product360Anomaly.description: Anomaly row shown inside a Product 360 view.

Product360WorkflowAction.title: Product360WorkflowAction
Product360WorkflowAction.description: Workflow audit event linked through a product alert.

ProductListResponse.title: ProductListResponse
ProductListResponse.description: Stable list response for Product endpoints.

ProductResponse.title: ProductResponse
ProductResponse.description: Stable public representation of a Product.

SaleListResponse.title: SaleListResponse
SaleListResponse.description: Stable list response for sales endpoints.

SaleResponse.title: SaleResponse
SaleResponse.description: Stable public representation of a sales record.

StockRiskListResponse.title: StockRiskListResponse
StockRiskListResponse.description: Stable list response for stock-risk endpoints.

StockRiskResponse.title: StockRiskResponse
StockRiskResponse.description: Stable public representation of product-level stock risk.

WorkflowActionResponse.title: WorkflowActionResponse
WorkflowActionResponse.description: Public representation of a persisted workflow decision/audit event.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: Decision comment. Required for reject and dismiss actions.

idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key
idempotency_key.description: Optional client-supplied key for safe retries.

WorkflowMutationRequest.title: WorkflowMutationRequest
WorkflowMutationRequest.description: Base request body for endpoint-specific workflow mutations.

WorkflowMutationResponse.title: WorkflowMutationResponse
WorkflowMutationResponse.description: Response returned by workflow mutation endpoints.
